title: Multi VeinMiner
description: Multi VeinMiner mod lets you mine multiple connected blocks at once by holding the "`" key while breaking a block.
body:
Multi VeinMiner is a simple quality-of-life mod that lets you mine, chop, and harvest multiple connected blocks at once. Hold the activation key (default: `) while breaking a block to activate. 

Supports four mining modes: Shapeless, Small Tunnel, Small Square, and Escape Tunnel. Each tool only works with its corresponding blocks — pickaxes for stone and ores, axes for wood, shovels for dirt and sand, and hoes for crops. 
There is no default key set for cycling mining modes — please open your keybindings settings and assign one yourself. 


Required on both client and server.
